title: Cauldron of Undying
description: Throw dyed items and blocks into a Cauldron of water to remove the dye. Plus Dirt to Mud and Concrete Powder to Concrete support.
body:
****Cauldron of Undying**** enables you to remove dye from... umm, dyed things*

Just fill a ****_Cauldron_**** up with water and toss in your items or blocks.

Throw ****_Dirt_**** and ****_Concrete Powder_**** in to get ****_Mud_**** and ****_Concrete_**** respectivly.

--****NEW****-- Harness support.

*(excluding leather & wolf armour)
